### 🔍 Summary

Brief overview of what this PR accomplishes (1-2 sentences).

### 🔧 Problem Statement

What problem does this PR solve? Why is this change needed?

- **Current behavior:** _(optional)_
- **Expected behavior:** _(optional)_

### ✨ Implementation

Technical high-level overview of the solution approach:
_(Include relevant sections, for example)_

- **Backend changes:** Brief description of API/database/service changes
- **Frontend changes:** Brief description of UI/UX changes
- **Infrastructure changes:** Brief description of deployment/config changes

## 🖼️ Demo

Relevant visual evidence demonstrating the changes with before/after comparisons:

**Before:** Screenshot/gif/log/video of previous behavior

**After:** Screenshot/gif/log/video of new behavior

**Test data/examples:** _(optional)_ Include sample data, API responses, test scenarios used, etc.

> _Note: Prefer screenshots/gifs over videos due to GitHub loading performance_

## 🔗 Related Issues & References

### Linked Issues

- **Closes:** #issue-number
- **Related:** #issue-number _(if applicable)_
- **Follow-up needed:** #issue-number _(if applicable)_

### External References

- **Documentation:** [Links to relevant docs] _(if applicable)_
- **Design docs:** [Links to design documents] _(if applicable)_
- **Discord discussions:** [Links to relevant Discord threads] _(if applicable)_

### Manual Testing

**What was tested manually during development, for example:**

- Tested success and validation error edge cases via Postman endpoints
- Verified UI changes and error handling in browser
- Ran database migration and tested schema configurations (create/restore cycle)
- _(Add specific test scenarios relevant to your changes)_

## ✅ PR Checklist

- [ ] I have tested this change locally
- [ ] I have requested review from GitHub Copilot and addressed useful comments _(if applicable)_
- [ ] Code changes include appropriate comments/docstrings
- [ ] Postman collection updated or not applicable for this PR
- [ ] Breaking changes are marked with `!` in commit message and team has been notified
- [ ] I have filled out every section of the PR template
- [ ] I have applied appropriate labels to categorize this PR
- [ ] I am mindful of how this change can affect integration/**system** tests and **will monitor and address test failures** if this change impacts them

## 📝 Developer Notes

_(Include only relevant sections below - these are examples of what can be included)_

**Technical Details:**

- Architecture decisions, performance considerations, etc.

**Deployment Notes:**

- Database migrations, configuration changes, rollback plan, etc.

**Review Focus Areas:**

- Specific areas where you'd like reviewer attention
